description: Consolidate E2E test files to reduce faucet calls — group ~5-6 tests per file with one beforeAll that funds a master wallet then distributes 5-10 XRP to sub-wallets

userStories.title: Create shared test funding helper
userStories.description: As a test author, I want a shared utility to fund wallets efficiently so I don't have to call the faucet multiple times per test file.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts with: fundMaster(client) calls faucet once; initTicketPool(client, master, count) submits TicketCreate and extracts TicketSequence values from meta.AffectedNodes; nextTicket() returns next ticket synchronously; generateWallets(count) creates unfunded wallets; createFunded(client, master, count, amountXrp=10) generates wallets and funds each concurrently using Sequence:0 + TicketSequence:nextTicket() via Promise.all
Export XRPL_WS constant (testnet WebSocket URL) from the helper
RULE: each individual it() block calls createFunded to get its own fresh wallets — wallets are NEVER shared across test cases
RULE: all funding payments use Sequence:0 + TicketSequence from the pool — never rely on account sequence for concurrent payments from master
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Consolidate payment + trust + offer tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want payment, trust, and offer tests consolidated so each group uses one faucet call.
acceptanceCriteria: payment: merge payment.core.test.ts + payment.iou.test.ts + payment.mpt.test.ts + payment.paths.test.ts into payment.network.test.ts (XRP/--json/--dry-run/--no-wait) and payment.tokens.test.ts (IOU/MPT/paths); delete originals
trust: merge trust.core.test.ts + trust.issuer.test.ts into trust.network.test.ts (1 faucet call, master funds issuer+holder+extras with 10 XRP); delete originals
offer: merge offer.core.test.ts + offer.flags.test.ts into offer.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
All consolidated files use fundMaster + createFunded from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Consolidate channel + escrow tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want channel and escrow tests consolidated so each group uses one faucet call.
acceptanceCriteria: channel: merge channel.create.test.ts + channel.fund.test.ts + channel.list.test.ts + channel.claim.test.ts into channel.network.test.ts (1 faucet call, participants funded with 20 XRP for channel ops); leave channel.sign.test.ts unchanged (no faucet); delete merged originals

escrow: merge escrow.create.test.ts + escrow.finish.test.ts + escrow.cancel.test.ts + escrow.list.test.ts into escrow.network.test.ts (1 faucet call, participants funded with 20 XRP); delete originals
All consolidated files use fundMaster + createFunded from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Consolidate check + clawback + multisig tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want check, clawback, and multisig tests consolidated so each group uses one faucet call.
acceptanceCriteria: check: merge check.create.test.ts + check.cash.test.ts + check.cancel.test.ts + check.list.test.ts into check.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
clawback: merge clawback.iou.test.ts + clawback.mpt.test.ts into clawback.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals

multisig: merge multisig.set.test.ts + multisig.delete.test.ts + multisig.list.test.ts into multisig.network.test.ts (1 faucet call, master funds main account + 3 signer wallets with 10 XRP each); delete originals
All consolidated files use fundMaster + createFunded from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

oracle: merge oracle.set.test.ts + oracle.get.test.ts + oracle.delete.test.ts into oracle.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
ticket: merge ticket.create.test.ts + ticket.list.test.ts into ticket.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
deposit-preauth: merge deposit-preauth.set.test.ts + deposit-preauth.list.test.ts into deposit-preauth.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
All consolidated files use fundMaster + createFunded from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Consolidate nft + account tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want nft and account tests consolidated so each group uses one faucet call per file.
acceptanceCriteria: nft: merge nft.mint.test.ts + nft.burn.test.ts + nft.modify.test.ts into nft.core.test.ts (1 faucet call); merge nft.offer.create.test.ts + nft.offer.cancel.test.ts + nft.offer.accept.test.ts + nft.offer.list.test.ts into nft.offers.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
account set: merge account.set.fields.test.ts + account.set.flags.test.ts + account.set.clawback.test.ts into account.set.network.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals
account keys: merge account.set-regular-key.test.ts + account.delete.test.ts into account.keys.test.ts (1 faucet call); delete originals

account queries: consolidate info.test.ts + balance.test.ts + transactions.test.ts + trust-lines.test.ts + offers.test.ts + channels.test.ts + nfts.test.ts into account.query.test.ts (1 faucet call, master sets up state for all query tests); delete originals
All consolidated files use fundMaster + createFunded from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
